title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AC-4
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AC-4 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AC-4 in the Access Control family. The control title for AC-4 is Information Flow Enforcement. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: CA-1 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, CA-1, belongs to the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family and is titled Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring Policy and Procedures. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
